/usr/bin/c++ -Wall  -Wsuggest-override -Werror=vla -pthread -O3 -DNDEBUG -s -rdynamic CMakeFiles/property_tree.dir/property_tree.cpp.o CMakeFiles/property_tree.dir/__/common/richio.cpp.o CMakeFiles/property_tree.dir/__/common/exceptions.cpp.o CMakeFiles/property_tree.dir/__/common/dsnlexer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/property_tree.dir/__/common/ptree.cpp.o -o property_tree  -pthread -lwx_gtk3u_gl-3.2 -lwx_gtk3u_aui-3.2 -lwx_gtk3u_html-3.2 -lwx_gtk3u_core-3.2 -lwx_baseu_net-3.2 -lwx_baseu-3.2 -lwx_baseu_xml-3.2 -lwx_gtk3u_stc-3.2
